title: CVE-2021-25459 — CVSS 4.0 (MEDIUM)
content:
# CVE-2021-25459

CVSS Score: 4.0 (MEDIUM)
Published: 2021-09-09T19:15:10.820
CWEs: CWE-285, NVD-CWE-Other

An improper access control vulnerability in sspInit() in BlockchainTZService prior to SMR Sep-2021 Release 1 allows attackers to start BlockchainTZService.

References: https://security.samsungmobile.com/securityUpdate.smsb?year=2021&month=9, https://security.samsungmobile.com/securityUpdate.smsb?year=2021&month=9
